## Summary

Enforce Nephew/framework entity response identity with visible receipt signatures, response_signature MOIC metadata, and MOIC Signature Patrol. Use when…

## Description

Enforce Nephew/framework entity response identity with visible receipt signatures, response_signature MOIC metadata, and MOIC Signature Patrol. Use when working on Nephew, CLOAK, framework entities, agent identity, response signing, imposter detection, MCP tool output, Cursor/Claude global rules, or any request mentioning MOIC, Moment of Introduction Code, response signature, or entity sign-off.

## Invoke

Use **moic-response-signatures**.
